title: Annual General Meeting 2025
description:
The ISTE Student Chapter CEAL Annual General Meeting (AGM) 2025 is our flagship gathering where our entire community connects, reflects, and looks forward.

This is a pivotal day dedicated to reviewing the milestones and initiatives of the past year, strategizing our roadmap for the future, and recognizing the remarkable minds that drive our chapter's success. Whether we are discussing upcoming innovations or honoring our outstanding volunteers for their dedication and excellence, this gathering is where ideas take shape and momentum builds.
